Article.ArticleTitle: Epidemiology and health care burden of autoimmune liver diseases in Mexico.

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: Gastroenterology Service, Department of Internal Medicine, Faculty of Medicine, Hospital Universitario "Dr. José E. González," Universidad Autónoma de Nuevo León Monterrey, Mexico.
Gastroenterology Service, Department of Internal Medicine, Faculty of Medicine, Hospital Universitario "Dr. José E. González," Universidad Autónoma de Nuevo León Monterrey, Mexico.
Department of Medicine, Liver Center, Beth Israel Deaconess Medical Center, Harvard Medical School, Boston, Massachusetts, USA.
Department of Medicine, Liver Center, Beth Israel Deaconess Medical Center, Harvard Medical School, Boston, Massachusetts, USA.

MedlineCitation.CoiStatement: Alan Bonder consults for Intercept. He received grants from Zydus Therapeutics, ChemomAb Ltd., Cymabay, Mirium Therapeutics, Intercept, Gilead, and CARA Therapeutics. The remaining authors have no conflicts to report.

Reference.Citation: Trivedi PJ, Hirschfield GM. Recent advances in clinical practice: Epidemiology of autoimmune liver diseases. Gut. 2021;70:1989–2003.

Consejo Nacional de Población (CONAPO), Dirección General de Estadística en Salud Pública (DGESP), Base de datos de las defunciones observadas en 2012, INEGI/SS» y «Proyecciones de la población de México, 2010-2030».
